description: Very good product on a number of level: administration, security, reliability and possible setup for bridges between internal setups and other clients not in our environment.
author: Raphael G.
pros: THe number of options when it comes to security and possible setups gives Cerberus an edge on how implement and administer all FTP solutions in any Company's environment.
cons: The update options and informations are not always very clear and some direct references to articles would be welcome when major changes are done.

description: Cerberus support helped us with the onboarding process, we haven't had to contact them since. The user interface is intuitive and there is a lot more functionality than we require.
author: Mark C.
pros: The user interface is very simple to use and the product has a lot of functionality. The logging is in depth and really helpful when you need to look for account or connectivity issues.
cons: The cost. Having used this system for several years, we are reluctantly moving away as the cost is prohibitive.

review_title: a once great product - until management became greedy
description: I will be cancelling with Cerberus and will never use them again - I do not support any company that believes a 430% increase in ok.
author: Francois G.
pros: The software was easy to use - did what it said and it was priced well in the market.
cons: Management decided to increase the price of the software by 430% !! - from $289 to $1536 - What used to be affordable software has now become insanely priced. It clearly shows that making money is all that is important to

description: I don't have to worry about our FTP server with Cerberus...it's always up and security patches are released in a timely manner. It is lightweight (I can serve over 1000 connections on 2 vCPUs and 6GB of RAM...I could server 700 of 3GB of RAM previously), unobtrusive, and really a pleasure to use.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Cerberus is extremely easy to setup, implement, and use. It is dead simple, reliable, user friendly, and straightforward to secure.
cons: Not negatives, but missing features/improvable features: I'd like the option to run servers in high availability (there is a sync option, but not quite the same). I'd like to see more integration options for MFA (there are 2-3, but I'd like to see this expanded). I'd like integration with Active Directory to be more straightforward, and the option to integrate Azure Active Directory. The option to have a user account and admin account be the same. I realize there's some risk here, but that should be left to the organization to accept or avoid.

review_title: Cerberus FTP Server is a Rock-Solid FTP Server Application!
description: Amazing support helped us when moving from a competitors product to get up and running.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like how the web interface can sync with a secondary server to backup your configuration and users in case of a system failure.
cons: I feel that some of the reporting could be more customizable.

description: Automated File transfer to 3rd parties, works great, providing confidence in it's daily operations. Is now running well with minimal maintenance checks required.
author: Phil L.
pros: Comparative to other products, Cerberus is fully featured but straightforward to use due to it's full GUI functionality.The scheduling of transfers to specific destinations (aka Targets) was easy to create and get up and running in minutes.
cons: There is an internal event log with a limited window of events, but for more detailed logging a SQL based installation is required.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Sai R.
pros: A sophisticated file transfer system with SFTP, https, and logging features for standard compliance. A FIPS-validated secure file transfer server that integrates with AD and LDAP. Runs on Windows, easy setup, meets HIPAA requirements.
cons: Permissions and customization of the product.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: One Stop Secure File Collaboration Service
description: Setting up user accounts is easy and file permission is easy to map at setup.
author: Joshua O.
pros: Active directory users are uploaded automatically when synchronized with the domain. Easily managed and basic restrictions are set for user access with secure data transfer. If the SSL certificate is not valid, the SFTP url will be down and not accessible.
cons: Too expensive and License price is not fixed, always increasing every day. There is no File approval process before users are allowed to download files.

review_title: Best FTP Server I have ever used.
description: Best software if you want to do some R&D regarding VFS. It'll provide every detail while you call the server.
author: Priyabrata S.
pros: I was looking for a FTP server which will support ApacheVFS. It not only supports this but gives a detail brief about how much time it takes to upload or download a file, how many hits happening in order to call the service, the size of the file..etc. All you have to do is start the server and call your service. It even won't consume much resource of the system, hence your system won't get slow if the server starts.
cons: Feature wise it's great and simply awesome but it's a bit expensive for normal developer who is doing some personal R&D on different VFS.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A powerful and reliable FTP Server
author: Fábio S.
pros: Cerberus FTP Server is a powerful file transfer software which support various protocols, such as FTP, FTPS, SFTP, HTTP and HTTPS, which have, by definition, secure layers to keep files save and encrypted.It also supports two-factor authentication, granting another layer of protection to data in transit.
cons: Free trial only allows for 25 day use and no free license is available. Standard license supports most features, but can be coasty for low budget organizations.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Mutti M.
pros: Overall graphics and users/groups management.
cons: 1. I think permissions for folders should be managed separately from permissions for files. 2. It should be possible to protect a folder and let the inner files open to modifications. 3. A great improvement also would come if files could be modified through the web interface (https). 4. Downloads and uploads are not practical when you wish to work completely online. 5. I would like to have online files open for modifications but protect them from downloads (copyright).

author: Bob K.
pros: Allows us to keep our file transfers in house. Provides SSL secure SFPT file transfers with complete loggin of all activity as we require.
cons: Have zero complaints. Support is prompt and knowledgeable. Does everything we need.

description: So far our deployment experience has been very good. Everything is working as expected and the Event Manager has helped simplify our automation. Support has been very good as well.
author: Shaun M.
pros: The software is easy to install and update. Security and feature updates are regular. The software is very light weight compared to some of the competitors.
cons: The interface is a little clunky and takes some getting used to, but is quite functional.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Ruben A.
pros: Easy setup and administration. Our client use an automated procedure to upload files to our server and have had no issues.
cons: There is nothing that I do not like about the software

review_title: Cerberus FTP Server is great and easy to setup and use, bugs free and comes with great support.
description: The software works well and don't encounter any issues so far.
author: Shui Kee L.
pros: Briefly, the sFTP function works well and easy to setup with very good documentation manual, and importantly the logging activities which are stored and segregated in daily log file which is very useful for troubleshooting with counterpart whenever there is reported issue and the log file will clearly show the login, receiving, removing and sending events. Overall the interface is very user-friendly and that translates well into ease of use and maintains. Lastly but not the least is the pricing in comparison to other ftp server vendor in terms of functionalities namely control.
cons: No option to create SSH key pair files for customer, and thus I have to use ftp voyager to generate these files.

author: Antonios M.
pros: As a DSO (Distribution System Operator) we use the software (SFTP) to communicate important files and information to our customers (Gas Suppliers). In Cerberus FTP Server we have found the ease of implementation the reliability and security we needed.
cons: There are no cons that could be addressed.

description: My business problem is to found a simple SFTP server, secure and also compatible with my solution infrastructure
author: Nicolas G.
pros: The most feature I like is simplycity. less than one day to learn et setup the software to production.. very efficient
cons: The price is a little bit more than, I want, and renewal is expensive I think so

review_title: Been a happy user of CerberusFTP for many years now. Does what we need it to do.
author: John S.
pros: Easy to use both for admin and users. Can be customize and manage from server or webGUI is a plus with no hidden menus or hard to find items.
cons: Updates can be a bit weird and have to update the settings for the service every time. Wish the reporting function worked a bit better

review_title: Thes best of Cerberus FTP Server
author: Reina C.
pros: I really like that it is a very friendly application, I can integrate it with the active directory, security and that the versions are constantly updated.
cons: The amount of GB that I can provide to the user's folder is missing, that is, do not copy more GB than allowed in a folder

author: Paul J.
pros: We have had some unique ftp needs (relating to LDAP authentication for accounts) and cerberus has been able to met them all. They support has been great, and they publish updates frequently.
cons: It's expensive, but it is still a good value, as I could not find any better option that cost less. The support is well worth it to. I would highly recommend keeping an active subscription. But that's pretty standard for enterprise software.

author: Peter N.
pros: Very easy to install and set up. Stable and secure and especially mail for new files in folders is much appreciated by users.
cons: The report module does not work as expected

author: John V.
pros: Reliability, support, ease of use, meets our requirements
cons: There were no shortcomings with this software.

review_title: Very stable and easy to use FTP server
description: Stable, easy to use, fair price and several prices/configurations for different needs. Secure. Easy to by over the WEB.
author: Armando A.
pros: I have used several FTP servers but the best solution, for my needs, is Cerberus by far. I use Cerberus for only 30 users and with low traffic. I never used the server for a big number of user and high demand, so I can not comments about that profile. But I can say that for my goals is perfect and with fair price.

description: Very Good FTP with data security.
author: Avinash T.
pros: User friendly GUI with very good security features
cons: Reporting is not that much good, management will not happy on this

author: Stephen W.
pros: Active Directory integration is huge for us. Event Manager is great as it allows us to launch PowerShell scripts upon certain actions. Conceptually simple to understand. SECURE DATA TRANSFERS
cons: Can be fiddly to configure groups. The UI changes somewhwat significantly from time to time.
